Self.Wiki: Defines parameters relating to the camera used in event menus.

cameraType.Wiki: The behavior to use for this camera.

cameraBasePosType.Wiki: The reference point to use for this camera.

axisOffsetX.Wiki: The axis offset on the x-axis (in metres).

axisOffsetY.Wiki: The axis offset on the y-axis (in metres).

axisOffsetZ.Wiki: The axis offset on the z-axis (in metres).

rayWidth.Wiki: The thickness of the camera ray.

hitCollision.Wiki: The collision size of the camera.

positionOffsetZ.Wiki: The additional turning radius of the camera (in metres).

fulcrumRate.Wiki: 0 is the target, 1 is the reference point.

rotationX.Wiki: The rotation of the camera on the x-axis (in degrees).

rotationY.Wiki: The rotation of the camera on the y-axis (in degrees).

startTransTime.Wiki: The interpolation time (in seconds) at the start of switching.

endTransTime.Wiki: The interpolation time (in seconds) at the end of switching.

startTransType.Wiki: The interpolation type at the start of switching.

endTransType.Wiki: The interpolation type at the end of switching.

keepXAngle.Wiki: If enabled, the camera will maintain its tilt.

addXAngleAxis.Wiki: If enabled, applies x-axis tilt to the camera.
